title: Drive Thru Sneak
description: Ever wanted to place blocks on top of a chest while in a boat? This is the mod for you!
body:
A Minecraft mod that adds a keybinding to perform actions that use sneak
modifiers without dismounting vehicles.

The keybinding is named "Alternate Sneak", in the Gameplay section, and defaults to Caps Lock.

This mod must be installed on both the client and the server to work properly.  
If the server does not have this mod installed, the keybinding will do nothing.

The Fabric version requires Fabric API, while the Forge version has no dependencies.
